center.name: 布拉瓦島
center.summary: 布拉瓦島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cape Verde shearwater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The largest colonies are on the islands of Brava, Branco and Raso, though the species also breeds in smaller numbers on other islands in the archipelago. Though their pelagic distribution and movements are not well known, they are regularly seen around the islands in the breeding season
